stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns constructionPipelineRuntime (Argo Workflows on Kubernetes); sole permitted caller of that resource
volatility: Construction-task face of WorkflowRuntime volatility — how build/test/lint/package steps of a delivered system are executed (container-per-step toolchain isolation, k8s resource constraints, build-cache reuse).

outbound.name: constructionPipelineRuntime
outbound.how: direct, by value — submit/observe/cancel Argo Workflow resources via k8s API; idempotency via deterministic Workflow name derived from caller-supplied idempotencyKey

ops.stereotype: Activity-wrapped · idempotent on caller-supplied idempotencyKey · non-blocking submit
ops.note: Translates PipelineSpec to an Argo Workflow and submits; returns a stable handle; does not block for pipeline completion.

fields.name: Spec
fields.note: PipelineSpec struct { ProjectID ProjectID; ActivityID ConstructionActivityID; Steps []PipelineStep; Edges []StepDependency; WorkspaceRef ArtifactRef }

fields.name: IdempotencyKey
fields.note: caller-supplied, stable per logical submission attempt; opaque string

fields.name: Handle
fields.note: opaque string — infrastructure-defined deterministic Argo Workflow name + namespace; String()/Equal() helpers

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrTransient(retryable) | ErrAuth | ErrContractMisuse | ErrCapacity | ErrInfrastructure | ErrUnknown (all non-retryable)

ops.note: Returns point-in-time pipeline lifecycle phase, per-step outcomes, and failure diagnostic; Manager polls this between durable waits.

fields.name: FailedStep
fields.note: empty unless Phase==Failed; names the first failing step

fields.name: Diagnostic
fields.note: infrastructure-neutral failure summary; empty on success

ops.stereotype: Activity-wrapped · idempotent on intent · ErrNotFound → success
ops.note: Instructs infrastructure to stop the pipeline; drives the ncuc2 operator-pause path; already-absent treated as success.

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrTransient(retryable) | ErrNotFound(mapped to success on cancel) | ErrAuth | ErrContractMisuse (non-retryable)

dataContracts: PipelineSpec struct { ProjectID, ActivityID ConstructionActivityID, Steps []PipelineStep, Edges []StepDependency, WorkspaceRef ArtifactRef }
PipelineStep struct { Name string, Toolchain ToolchainRef, Command []string, Resources ResourceRequest, CacheKeys []string }
StepDependency struct { From string, To string }
ResourceRequest struct { CPUMillis int, MemMiB int, GPUs int }
ToolchainRef string // logical toolchain identity; resolved to container image internally
IdempotencyKey string // caller-supplied, stable per logical submission attempt
PipelineHandle struct { opaque string } // infrastructure-opaque; String()/Equal() helpers
PipelineObservation struct { Handle, Phase PipelinePhase, Steps []StepObservation, FailedStep string, Diagnostic string, StartedAt time.Time, FinishedAt *time.Time }
PipelinePhase int // Pending | Running | Succeeded | Failed | Cancelled
StepObservation struct { Name string, Outcome StepOutcome }
StepOutcome int // Pending | Running | Succeeded | Failed | Skipped
PipelineAccessError struct { Kind ErrorKind, Cause error, Retryable bool }
ErrorKind int // ErrUnknown | ErrTransient | ErrAuth | ErrNotFound | ErrCapacity | ErrInfrastructure | ErrContractMisuse
errorModel: PipelineAccessError with explicit Retryable flag. ErrTransient retryable=true; ErrAuth/ErrContractMisuse/ErrCapacity/ErrNotFound/ErrInfrastructure retryable=false. ErrCapacity is non-retryable (quota/no-node stall requires operator escalation). ErrNotFound on cancel → success.
idempotency: submitConstructionPipeline: idempotent on caller-supplied idempotencyKey — deterministic Argo Workflow name derived from key; AlreadyExists → return existing handle. observeConstructionPipeline: pure read, trivially idempotent. cancelConstructionPipeline: idempotent on intent; ErrNotFound → success.

revisions.summary: Initial design with Temporal op-kind/RetryPolicy/timeout classification on the RA surface.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE (Rev 2): removed all Temporal coupling from contract surface per founder layering directive; op-kind/RetryPolicy/timeout rows deleted; idempotencyKey added as caller-supplied parameter; retry semantics demoted to non-normative orchestration guidance §6. Citation correction applied (line 544 is outbound RA→Resource edge, not caller edge; cancel caller edge is 543). 9/9 App C §6 PASS, 0 WAIVED. OQ-1..6 all resolved. Non-blocking follow-ups for arch: named RetryPolicy library (OQ-5); architecture.dsl line-168 label tightening (OQ-6).
